<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>SST Manager — In Haus Industrial</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DESIGN SYSTEM — Industrial Safety Dark Theme
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
:root{
  --bg:         #F5F6FA;
  --surface:    #FFFFFF;
  --surface2:   #F0F2F8;
  --surface3:   #E8EAF2;
  --border:     #E0E3EE;
  --border2:    #CDD0DE;
  --text:       #12152A;
  --text2:      #5A6080;
  --text3:      #9098B8;
  --accent:     #006EFF;
  --accent2:    #0055CC;
  --accent-dim: rgba(0,110,255,.07);
  --accent-glow:rgba(0,110,255,.15);
  --warn:       #E07B00;
  --warn-dim:   rgba(224,123,0,.07);
  --danger:     #D92D20;
  --danger-dim: rgba(217,45,32,.07);
  --info:       #006EFF;
  --info-dim:   rgba(0,110,255,.07);
  --purple:     #7C3AED;
  --radius:     12px;
  --radius-sm:  7px;
  --font-head:  'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
  --font-body:  'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  --font-mono:  'DM Mono', monospace;
  --sidebar-w:  240px;
  --topbar-h:   60px;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--font-body);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;overflow-x:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:2px}

/* ── LAYOUT ── */
.app{display:flex;min-height:100vh}
.sidebar{width:var(--sidebar-w);background:#12152A;border-right:1px solid #1E2240;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:fixed;top:0;bottom:0;left:0;z-index:200;transition:.3s}
.main{margin-left:var(--sidebar-w);flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh}
.topbar{height:var(--topbar-h);background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 28px;gap:16px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--border)}
.content{padding:28px;flex:1}

/* ── SIDEBAR ── */
.sidebar-brand{padding:22px 20px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.brand-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.brand-icon{width:36px;height:36px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0}
.brand-name{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:20px;letter-spacing:1px;color:#EEF0F8;line-height:1}
.brand-sub{font-size:10px;color:#4A5080;margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px}
.nav-section{padding:16px 20px 4px;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:#4A5080;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 20px;cursor:pointer;color:#8890B8;font-size:13px;font-weight:400;border-left:2px solid transparent;transition:.15s;position:relative}
.nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#EEF0F8}
.nav-item.active{background:rgba(0,110,255,.15);color:#60A4FF;border-left-color:#60A4FF;font-weight:500}
.nav-icon{font-size:16px;width:20px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0}
.nav-badge{margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;background:var(--danger);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:1px 7px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:500;animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}}
.sidebar-company{padding:16px 20px;border-top:1px solid #1E2240;margin-top:auto}
.company-label{font-size:10px;color:#4A5080;font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px}
.company-sel{width:100%;background:#1E2240;border:1px solid #2E3460;color:#EEF0F8;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font-body);cursor:pointer}
.company-sel:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--accent)}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1.5px;flex:1;color:var(--text)}
.topbar-date{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font-body);font-weight:500;transition:.15s;white-space:nowrap}
.btn:hover{background:var(--surface3);border-color:var(--border2)}
.btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:#08090C;border-color:var(--accent);font-weight:600}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--accent2);border-color:var(--accent2)}
.btn-danger{color:var(--danger);border-color:rgba(255,61,90,.3)}
.btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger-dim)}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 12px;font-size:12px;border-radius:5px}

/* ── VIEWS ── */
.view{display:none;animation:fadeUp .25s ease}
.view.active{display:block}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── KPI ROW ── */
.kpi-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:24px}
.kpi{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 20px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:.2s;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.kpi:hover{border-color:var(--border2);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.kpi-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px}
.kpi-bar.green{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),transparent)}
.kpi-bar.warn{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--warn),transparent)}
.kpi-bar.danger{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--danger),transparent)}
.kpi-bar.info{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--info),transparent)}
.kpi-bar.gray{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--text3),transparent)}
.kpi-val{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:38px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.kpi-val.green{color:var(--accent)}
.kpi-val.warn{color:var(--warn)}
.kpi-val.danger{color:var(--danger)}
.kpi-val.info{color:var(--info)}
.kpi-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:5px}
.kpi-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* ── SECTION HEADER ── */
.sec-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px}
.sec-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:26px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text)}
.sec-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}

/* ── CARDS ── */
.card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius)}
.card-hdr{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.card-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:16px;letter-spacing:.8px;color:var(--text)}
.card-body{padding:20px}
.grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
.grid3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:16px}

/* ── TABLES ── */
.tbl-wrap{overflow-x:auto;border-radius:var(--radius);border:1px solid var(--border)}
table.tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}
table.tbl th{background:#F4F6FC;padding:11px 14px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#5A6080;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
table.tbl td{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:middle;color:var(--text);font-size:13px}
table.tbl tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
table.tbl tr:hover td{background:#F8F9FD}
table.tbl td .inp{background:transparent;border:1px solid transparent;padding:3px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font-body);color:var(--text);width:100%}
table.tbl td .inp:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface2)}
table.tbl td .inp:focus{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface3);outline:none}
table.tbl td select.inp{cursor:pointer}

/* ── INPUTS ── */
.inp{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);padding:9px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font-body);width:100%}
.inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--surface3)}
.inp::placeholder{color:var(--text3)}
select.inp{cursor:pointer}
textarea.inp{resize:vertical;min-height:60px}
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
.form-grid.c3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}
.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}
.form-group.span2{grid-column:span 2}
.form-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:500;font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px}

/* ── BADGES ── */
.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--font-mono);white-space:nowrap}
.b-ok{background:#DCFCE7;color:#166534;border:1px solid #BBF7D0}
.b-warn{background:#FEF3C7;color:#92400E;border:1px solid #FDE68A}
.b-danger{background:#FEE2E2;color:#991B1B;border:1px solid #FECACA}
.b-info{background:#DBEAFE;color:#1E40AF;border:1px solid #BFDBFE}
.b-gray{background:#F1F3F9;color:#5A6080;border:1px solid #E0E3EE}
.b-purple{background:#EDE9FE;color:#5B21B6;border:1px solid #DDD6FE}

/* ── PROGRESS ── */
.prog-bar{height:5px;background:var(--surface3);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px}
.prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .6s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.prog-fill.green{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#006EFF,#0055CC)}
.prog-fill.warn{background:#E07B00}
.prog-fill.danger{background:#D92D20}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
   EMPLOYEE CARDS — Main innovation
═══════════════════════════════════════ */
.emp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-bottom:24px}

.emp-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.emp-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.emp-card.open{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(0,110,255,.2)}
.emp-card-top{padding:16px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.emp-avatar{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:18px;letter-spacing:1px;flex-shrink:0}
.emp-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.emp-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.emp-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.emp-meta-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:4px}
.emp-stat-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 18px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:#F8F9FC}
.emp-stat-item{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.emp-stat-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}

/* Employee expanded detail panel */
.emp-detail{display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.emp-detail.open{display:block}
.emp-tabs{display:flex;background:#F4F6FC;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.emp-tab{padding:11px 18px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:.15s;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;white-space:nowrap;background:transparent}
.emp-tab:hover{color:var(--text)}
.emp-tab.active{color:#006EFF;border-bottom-color:#006EFF}
.emp-tab-content{display:none;padding:18px}
.emp-tab-content.active{display:block}

/* Training rows inside emp card */
.trn-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.trn-item{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 120px 120px 0 70px;gap:10px;align-items:center;transition:.15s;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
.trn-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2)}
.trn-item.ok{border-left:3px solid var(--accent)}
.trn-item.warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warn)}
.trn-item.danger{border-left:3px solid var(--danger)}
.trn-item.pending{border-left:3px solid var(--border2)}
.trn-name-wrap{min-width:0}
.trn-name{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500;line-height:1.3}
.trn-tipo{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-top:2px}
.trn-hdr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 110px 110px 100px 72px;gap:10px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.trn-search{margin-bottom:12px}

/* ASO inside emp card */
.aso-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.aso-item{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 110px 110px 90px 90px 72px auto;gap:10px;align-items:center}
.aso-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2)}
.aso-hdr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 110px 110px 90px 90px 72px auto;gap:10px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:4px}

/* Info tab inside emp card */
.info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
.info-field{background:var(--surface2);border-radius:7px;padding:10px 14px}
.info-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.info-val{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500}

/* ── FILTER BAR ── */
.filter-bar{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.filter-bar .inp{max-width:220px}
.filter-bar .inp:first-child{flex:1;max-width:340px}
.filter-count{font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-left:auto;white-space:nowrap}

/* ── STATUS CHART AREA ── */
.emp-progress-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 18px 12px;background:var(--surface)}
.emp-progress-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);white-space:nowrap}

/* ── DESVIO CARD ── */
.dev-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:4px 1fr auto;gap:14px;align-items:start}
.dev-stripe{border-radius:2px}
.dev-stripe.EPI{background:var(--danger)}
.dev-stripe.Comportamento{background:var(--warn)}
.dev-stripe.Procedimento{background:var(--info)}
.dev-stripe.default{background:var(--text3)}

/* ── MODAL ── */
.modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);z-index:999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
.modal-overlay.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.modal{background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;width:580px;max-width:96%;max-height:88vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}
.modal-hdr{padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.modal-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:20px;letter-spacing:1px}
.modal-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text2);font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:5px;line-height:1}
.modal-close:hover{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text)}
.modal-body{padding:24px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1}
.modal-footer{padding:16px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0}

/* ── CALENDAR ── */
.cal-cell{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px;min-height:72px;background:var(--surface);transition:.15s}
.cal-cell.today{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-dim)}
.cal-cell.holiday{border-color:rgba(255,61,90,.35);background:rgba(255,61,90,.04)}
.cal-cell.weekend{background:rgba(255,255,255,.01)}
.cal-day-num{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.cal-shift{border-radius:4px;padding:2px 5px;font-size:9px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:600;margin-top:2px}

/* ── COUNTDOWN BANNER ── */
.cd-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,110,255,.05),rgba(0,110,255,.02));border:1px solid rgba(0,110,255,.15);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;margin-bottom:24px}
.cd-days-num{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:52px;letter-spacing:2px;line-height:1;color:var(--accent)}
.cd-days-num.warn{color:var(--warn)}
.cd-days-num.danger{color:var(--danger)}
.cd-info-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:600}
.cd-info-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}
.cd-companies{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-left:auto;flex-wrap:wrap}
.cd-company-chip{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;text-align:center}
.cd-company-days{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:24px;line-height:1}
.cd-company-name{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;font-family:var(--font-mono)}

/* ── AUDIT SCORE ── */
.audit-item{border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:7px;border:1px solid}
.audit-item.ok{background:rgba(0,255,178,.05);border-color:rgba(0,255,178,.2)}
.audit-item.warn{background:rgba(255,184,48,.05);border-color:rgba(255,184,48,.2)}
.audit-item.danger{background:rgba(255,61,90,.05);border-color:rgba(255,61,90,.2)}

/* ── ALERTS ── */
.alert-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px}
.alert-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}

/* ── EMPTY ── */
.empty{padding:48px;text-align:center;color:var(--text3)}
.empty-icon{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px}
.empty-text{font-size:14px}

/* ── UTILS ── */
.mt8{margin-top:8px}.mt12{margin-top:12px}.mt16{margin-top:16px}.mt20{margin-top:20px}
.flex-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.ellipsis{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:200px}
.divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:12px 0}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">

<!-- ════════════ SIDEBAR ════════════ -->
<aside class="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-brand">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
      <div style="background:#006EFF;border-radius:8px;width:38px;height:38px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0">
        <span style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-1px">IH</span>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#EEF0F8;line-height:1">IN HAUS</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:#4A5080;margin-top:1px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px">SST Manager</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <nav>
    <div class="nav-section">Visão Geral</div>
    <div class="nav-item active" onclick="nav('dashboard')"><span class="nav-icon">◈</span> Dashboard</div>
    <div class="nav-section">Pessoas</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('empregados')"><span class="nav-icon">◉</span> Empregados <span class="nav-badge" id="nb-pend" style="display:none">0</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('aso')"><span class="nav-icon">◎</span> ASO / Exames</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('treinamentos')"><span class="nav-icon">◑</span> Treinamentos</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('advertencias')"><span class="nav-icon">▲</span> Advertências</div>
    <div class="nav-section">Segurança</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('desvios')"><span class="nav-icon">◆</span> Desvios</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('brigada')"><span class="nav-icon">◐</span> Brigada</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('padrinho')"><span class="nav-icon">◑</span> Padrinho</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('agendamentos')"><span class="nav-icon">🗓</span> Agendamentos <span class="nav-badge" id="nb-agend" style="display:none">0</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="nav('escala')"><span class="nav-icon">◷</span> Calendário</div>
  </nav>
  <div class="sidebar-company">
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:#4A5080;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px">Empresa</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:#8890B8;font-weight:500">In Haus Industrial</div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:#4A5080;margin-top:2px">CNPJ: Samarco — Ubu</div>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- ════════════ MAIN ════════════ -->
<div class="main">
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="topbar-title" id="view-title">DASHBOARD</div>
  <div class="flex-row" style="gap:12px">
    <span class="topbar-date" id="today-date"></span>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('empregado')">+ Empregado</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="content">

<!-- DASHBOARD -->
<div class="view active" id="view-dashboard">
  <div class="cd-banner" id="cd-banner" style="border:1px solid rgba(0,110,255,.15);border-radius:12px;padding:20px 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;margin-bottom:24px;background:rgba(0,110,255,.04)"></div>
  <div class="kpi-row" id="kpi-row"></div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;margin-bottom:18px">
    <!-- ASO Chart -->
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-hdr">
        <span class="card-title">🩺 ASO — Situação Geral</span>
        <span id="aso-chart-total" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)"></span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body" style="padding:16px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
          <div style="position:relative;height:200px;width:200px;flex-shrink:0">
            <canvas id="chart-aso"></canvas>
          </div>
          <div id="aso-legend" style="flex:1"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Desvios Chart -->
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-hdr">
        <span class="card-title">⚠ Desvios por Tipo</span>
        <span id="dev-chart-total" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)"></span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body" style="padding:16px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
          <div style="position:relative;height:200px;width:200px;flex-shrink:0">
            <canvas id="chart-dev"></canvas>
          </div>
          <div id="dev-legend" style="flex:1"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Alertas -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <span class="card-title">🔔 Alertas — ASOs e Treinamentos críticos</span>
      <span id="alert-count-label" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="max-height:380px;overflow-y:auto" id="dash-alertas"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EMPREGADOS -->
<div class="view" id="view-empregados">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">EMPREGADOS</div><div class="sec-sub" id="emp-count-label"></div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('empregado')">+ Novo empregado</button>
  </div>
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <input class="inp" id="emp-search" placeholder="🔍  Buscar por nome, matrícula, cargo..." oninput="renderEmpregados()">
    <select class="inp" id="emp-filter-cargo" onchange="renderEmpregados()"><option value="">Todos os cargos</option></select>
    <select class="inp" id="emp-filter-status" onchange="renderEmpregados()">
      <option value="">Todos os status</option>
      <option value="ok">Em dia</option>
      <option value="warn">Atenção</option>
      <option value="danger">Pendências</option>
    </select>
    <select class="inp" id="emp-filter-turno" onchange="renderEmpregados()">
      <option value="">Todos os turnos</option>
      <option>Diurno</option><option>Noturno</option><option>Administrativo</option>
    </select>
    <span class="filter-count" id="emp-filter-count"></span>
  </div>
  <div id="emp-grid" class="emp-grid"></div>
</div>

<!-- ASO -->
<div class="view" id="view-aso">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">ASO / EXAMES</div><div class="sec-sub">Agendamento inteligente pela escala de turnos</div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('aso')">+ Registrar ASO</button>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-row" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)" id="aso-kpis"></div>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:5px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <button class="btn active" id="asoTab-anual" onclick="asoSubTab('anual')" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;font-size:12px">📅 Anual</button>
    <button class="btn" id="asoTab-semestral" onclick="asoSubTab('semestral')" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;font-size:12px">📆 Semestral</button>
    <button class="btn" id="asoTab-naoapl" onclick="asoSubTab('naoapl')" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;font-size:12px">🚫 N/A Semestral</button>
    <button class="btn" id="asoTab-agendados" onclick="asoSubTab('agendados')" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;font-size:12px">🗓 Agendamentos</button>
    <button class="btn" id="asoTab-todos" onclick="asoSubTab('todos')" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;font-size:12px">📋 Todos</button>
  </div>
  <div id="aso-pane-anual"><div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Turma</th><th>Último ASO</th><th>Vencimento</th><th>Dias</th><th>Exame</th><th>Agendamento</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="aso-tbody-anual"></tbody></table></div></div></div>
  <div id="aso-pane-semestral" style="display:none"><div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Turma</th><th>Último ASO</th><th>Vencimento</th><th>Dias</th><th>Exame</th><th>Agendamento</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="aso-tbody-semestral"></tbody></table></div></div></div>
  <div id="aso-pane-naoapl" style="display:none"><div style="text-align:right;margin-bottom:10px"><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openModal('naoapl')">+ Adicionar isenção</button></div><div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Motivo</th><th>Data laudo</th><th>Médico</th><th>Válido até</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="aso-tbody-naoapl"></tbody></table></div></div></div>
  <div id="aso-pane-agendados" style="display:none"><div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Periodicidade</th><th>Data agendada</th><th>Turno</th><th>Horário</th><th>Local</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="aso-tbody-agendados"></tbody></table></div></div><div style="text-align:center;margin-top:14px"><button class="btn" onclick="gerarAgendamentosAuto()">⚡ Gerar agendamentos automáticos</button></div></div>
  <div id="aso-pane-todos" style="display:none"><div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Periodicidade</th><th>Exame(s)</th><th>Realização</th><th>Vencimento</th><th>Médico</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="aso-tbody"></tbody></table></div></div></div>
</div>

<!-- TREINAMENTOS -->
<div class="view" id="view-treinamentos">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">TREINAMENTOS</div><div class="sec-sub" id="trn-count-label"></div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('treinamento')">+ Registrar</button>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-row" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)" id="trn-kpis"></div>
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <input class="inp" id="trn-search" placeholder="🔍  Buscar empregado ou treinamento..." oninput="renderTreinamentos()">
    <select class="inp" id="trn-filter-emp" onchange="renderTreinamentos()" style="max-width:200px"><option value="">Todos empregados</option></select>
    <select class="inp" id="trn-filter-status" onchange="renderTreinamentos()"><option value="">Todos status</option><option value="ok">✓ Em dia</option><option value="vencendo">⚠ Vencendo</option><option value="vencido">✕ Vencido</option><option value="pendente">— Pendente</option></select>
    <select class="inp" id="trn-filter-origem" onchange="renderTreinamentos()"><option value="">Toda origem</option><option>Passaporte Industrial</option><option>Externo</option><option>Interno</option></select>
  </div>
  <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
    <thead><tr><th style="padding-left:14px">Treinamento</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Realização</th><th>Vencimento</th><th>Origem</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="trn-tbody"></tbody>
  </table></div></div>
</div>

<!-- ADVERTENCIAS -->
<div class="view" id="view-advertencias">
  <div class="sec-hdr"><div class="sec-title">ADVERTÊNCIAS</div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('advertencia')">+ Registrar</button></div>
  <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Empregado</th><th>Data</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Motivo</th><th>Providência</th><th>Responsável</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="adv-tbody"></tbody></table></div></div>
</div>

<!-- DESVIOS -->
<div class="view" id="view-desvios">
  <div class="sec-hdr"><div class="sec-title">DESVIOS E INCIDENTES</div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('desvio')">+ Registrar Desvio</button></div>
  <div class="kpi-row" id="dev-kpis"></div>
  <div class="grid2" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card"><div class="card-hdr"><span class="card-title">Por tipo</span></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="chart-dev-tipo" height="200"></canvas></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="card-hdr"><span class="card-title">Evolução mensal</span></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="chart-dev-mes" height="200"></canvas></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Data</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th><th>Local</th><th>Empregado</th><th>Tratativa</th><th>Reunião</th><th>Reincidência</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="dev-tbody"></tbody></table></div></div>
</div>

<!-- BRIGADA -->
<div class="view" id="view-brigada">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">BRIGADA DE EMERGÊNCIA</div><div class="sec-sub" id="brig-pct-label"></div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('brigadista')">+ Adicionar Brigadista</button>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-row" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)" id="brig-kpis"></div>
  <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Nome</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Função</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Formação</th><th>Certificado</th><th>Vencimento</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="brig-tbody"></tbody></table></div></div>
</div>

<!-- PADRINHO -->
<div class="view" id="view-padrinho">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">PROGRAMA PADRINHO</div><div class="sec-sub">PRO-SST-06 — Acompanhamento 4 meses</div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('padrinho')">+ Novo Apadrinhamento</button>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-row" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)" id="pad-kpis"></div>
  <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Apadrinhado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Padrinho</th><th>Início</th><th>Conclusão</th><th>Avaliações</th><th>Situação</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="pad-tbody"></tbody></table></div></div>
</div>

<!-- AGENDAMENTOS -->
<div class="view" id="view-agendamentos">
  <div class="sec-hdr" style="flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px">
    <div>
      <div class="sec-title">AGENDAMENTO DE EXAMES</div>
      <div class="sec-sub">Direcionamento automático por vencimento · escala de turno · férias</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex-row" style="gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <!-- Upload Indicador de Saúde -->
      <label style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:7px;background:var(--surface2);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;transition:.15s" title="Arraste ou clique para carregar a planilha Indicador de Saúde (XLS) e atualizar os ASOs automaticamente">
        📂 Atualizar via planilha
        <input type="file" accept=".xls,.xlsx" onchange="importarIndicadorSaude(this)" style="display:none">
      </label>
      <button class="btn" onclick="asoSubTab('agendados');nav('aso')" style="font-size:12px">Ver confirmados →</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="gerarTodosAgendamentos()">⚡ Gerar todos</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Upload feedback -->
  <div id="upload-feedback" style="display:none;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:12px"></div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="filter-bar" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <input class="inp" id="agend-search" placeholder="🔍  Buscar empregado..." oninput="renderAgendamentos()" style="max-width:280px;flex:1">
    <select class="inp" id="agend-filter-tipo" onchange="renderAgendamentos()" style="max-width:160px">
      <option value="">Anual + Semestral</option>
      <option value="Anual">Apenas Anual</option>
      <option value="Semestral">Apenas Semestral</option>
    </select>
    <select class="inp" id="agend-filter-urgencia" onchange="renderAgendamentos()" style="max-width:160px">
      <option value="">Toda urgência</option>
      <option value="vencido">🔴 Vencido</option>
      <option value="critico">🟠 Crítico (≤15d)</option>
      <option value="atencao">🟡 Atenção (≤60d)</option>
      <option value="ok">🟢 Em dia (>60d)</option>
    </select>
    <span id="agend-count-label" style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-left:auto"></span>
  </div>

  <!-- KPIs rápidos -->
  <div id="agend-kpis" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px"></div>

  <!-- Lista principal -->
  <div id="agend-list"></div>
</div>

<!-- CALENDÁRIO -->
<div class="view" id="view-escala">
  <div class="sec-hdr">
    <div><div class="sec-title">CALENDÁRIO CORPORATIVO 2026</div><div class="sec-sub">Escala de turnos A/B/C/D + Administrativo + Feriados Samarco Ubu</div></div>
    <div class="flex-row"><button class="btn" onclick="openModal('ferias')">🏖 Férias</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('config_emp_escala')">⚙ Config. turmas</button></div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;align-items:center">
    <span class="badge b-info" style="font-size:11px">T1 Turno 1</span>
    <span class="badge b-warn" style="font-size:11px">T2 Turno 2</span>
    <span class="badge b-ok" style="font-size:11px">C Compensação</span>
    <span class="badge b-gray" style="font-size:11px">FF Folga</span>
    <span class="badge b-purple" style="font-size:11px">🏖 Férias</span>
    <span class="badge b-gray" style="font-size:11px">🏢 ADM</span>
    <span class="badge b-danger" style="font-size:11px">🚩 Feriado</span>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card-hdr" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleCard('card-escala-config')">
      <span class="card-title">⚙ Configuração de turma por empregado</span>
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)" id="card-escala-config-toggle">▼ Expandir</span>
    </div>
    <div id="card-escala-config" style="display:none">
      <div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Cargo</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Turma</th><th>Horário T1</th><th>Horário T2</th><th>Horário ADM</th></tr></thead><tbody id="escala-emp-tbody"></tbody></table></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card-hdr" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleCard('card-ferias-list')">
      <span class="card-title">🏖 Períodos de Férias</span>
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)" id="card-ferias-list-toggle">▼ Expandir</span>
    </div>
    <div id="card-ferias-list" style="display:none">
      <div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Empregado</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Turma</th><th>Início</th><th>Fim</th><th>Dias</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="ferias-tbody"></tbody></table></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <span class="card-title">📅 Calendário 2026</span>
      <div class="flex-row">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="prevMonth()">‹</button>
        <span id="cal-mes-label" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:13px;min-width:110px;text-align:center"></span>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="nextMonth()">›</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="calMonth=new Date().getMonth()+1;calYear=2026;renderCalendar()">Hoje</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center">
      <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)">MOSTRAR:</span>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-A" checked onchange="renderCalendar()"> <span style="color:#4D9FFF">■</span> Turma A</label>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-B" checked onchange="renderCalendar()"> <span style="color:#FFB830">■</span> Turma B</label>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-C" checked onchange="renderCalendar()"> <span style="color:#00FFB2">■</span> Turma C</label>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-D" checked onchange="renderCalendar()"> <span style="color:#F472B6">■</span> Turma D</label>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-ADM" checked onchange="renderCalendar()"> <span style="color:#8890AA">■</span> ADM</label>
      <label style="font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px"><input type="checkbox" id="show-nomes" onchange="renderCalendar()"> Nomes</label>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body" style="padding:12px;overflow-x:auto"><div id="cal-grid"></div></div>
    <div style="padding:10px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:7px">Feriados e compensações do mês</div>
      <div id="cal-feriados-mes" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /content -->
</div><!-- /main -->
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div class="modal-title" id="modal-title"></div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="modal-body"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="modal-save">Salvar</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>

let currentCompany = 'ihi';
let charts = {};
const TODAY = new Date(); TODAY.setHours(0,0,0,0);

const COLORS_AVATAR = ['#00E5A0','#4DA8FF','#FFB340','#FF4D6A','#A78BFA','#FB923C','#34D399','#60A5FA'];
function avatarColor(n){ return COLORS_AVATAR[(n.charCodeAt(0)+n.charCodeAt(n.length-1))%COLORS_AVATAR.length]; }
function initials(n){ return n.split(' ').slice(0,2).map(x=>x[0]).join('').toUpperCase(); }

// ── STORAGE ──
function getKey(k){ return currentCompany+'_'+k; }
function loadArr(k){ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(getKey(k))||'[]'); }catch(e){return[];} }
function saveArr(k,v){ try{ localStorage.setItem(getKey(k),JSON.stringify(v)); }catch(e){} }

function getEmpregados(){ return loadArr('emp'); }
function saveEmpregados(v){ saveArr('emp',v); }
function getASO(){ return loadArr('aso'); }
function saveASO(v){ saveArr('aso',v); }
function getTreinamentos(){ return loadArr('trn'); }
function saveTreinamentos(v){ saveArr('trn',v); }
function getAdvertencias(){ return loadArr('adv'); }
function saveAdvertencias(v){ saveArr('adv',v); }
function getDesvios(){ return loadArr('dev'); }
function saveDesvios(v){ saveArr('dev',v); }
function getBrigada(){ return loadArr('brig'); }
function saveBrigada(v){ saveArr('brig',v); }
function getPadrinhos(){ return loadArr('pad'); }
function savePadrinhos(v){ saveArr('pad',v); }

// ── UTILS ──
function daysDiff(ds){ if(!ds) return null; const d=new Date(ds); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); return Math.ceil((d-TODAY)/86400000); }
function addMonths(ds,m){ if(!ds||!m) return ''; const d=new Date(ds); d.setMonth(d.getMonth()+parseInt(m)); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }
function fmtDate(s){ if(!s) return '—'; const[y,mo,d]=s.split('-'); return `${d}/${mo}/${y}`; }
function tempoNa(adm){ if(!adm) return '—'; const d=new Date(adm); const mo=Math.floor((TODAY-d)/(30*24*3600000)); return mo<12?mo+'m':Math.floor(mo/12)+'a '+(mo%12)+'m'; }
function trnStatus(venc){
  if(!venc) return 'pendente';
  const d=daysDiff(venc);
  if(d<0) return 'vencido';
  if(d<=60) return 'vencendo';
  return 'ok';
}
function asoStatus(venc){
  if(!venc) return 'pendente';
  const d=daysDiff(venc);
  if(d<0) return 'vencido';
  if(d<=60) return 'vencendo';
  return 'ok';
}
function statusBadge(s){
  const m={
    ok:'<span class="badge b-ok">✓ Em dia</span>',
    vencendo:'<span class="badge b-warn">⚠ Vencendo</span>',
    vencido:'<span class="badge b-danger">✕ Vencido</span>',
    pendente:'<span class="badge b-gray">— Pendente</span>'
  };
  return m[s]||m.pendente;
}

// ── NAVIGATION ──
let currentView = 'dashboard';
const VIEW_TITLES = { dashboard:'Dashboard', empregados:'Empregados', aso:'ASO / Exames', agendamentos:'Agendamento de Exames', escala:'Escala de Turnos e Férias', treinamentos:'Treinamentos', advertencias:'Advertências', desvios:'Desvios e Incidentes', brigada:'Brigada de Emergência', padrinho:'Programa Padrinho' };
function nav(v){
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('view-'+v).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(el=>{ if(el.getAttribute('onclick')?.includes("'"+v+"'")) el.classList.add('active'); });
  document.getElementById('view-title').textContent = VIEW_TITLES[v]||v;
  currentView = v;
  renderView(v);
}

function renderView(v){
  if(v==='dashboard') renderDashboard();
  else if(v==='empregados') renderEmpregados();
  else if(v==='aso') renderASO();
  else if(v==='agendamentos') renderAgendamentos();
  else if(v==='escala') renderEscala();
  else if(v==='treinamentos') renderTreinamentos();
  else if(v==='advertencias') renderAdvertencias();
  else if(v==='desvios') renderDesvios();
  else if(v==='brigada') renderBrigada();
  else if(v==='padrinho') renderPadrinho();
}

// changeCompany removed — single company mode

function updateNavBadge(){
  const trns=getTreinamentos();
  let pending=0;
  trns.forEach(t=>{ const s=trnStatus(t.vencimento); if(s==='vencido'||s==='pendente') pending++; });
  const nb=document.getElementById('nb-pend');
  if(nb){ nb.textContent=pending; nb.style.display=pending?'':'none'; }
  // Update agendamentos badge
  const asos=getASO(); const naoApl=getNaoApl();
  const naoAplIds=new Set(naoApl.map(n=>String(n.empId)));
  let urgent=0;
  getEmpregados().forEach(emp=>{
    ['Anual','Semestral'].forEach(per=>{
      if(per==='Semestral'&&naoAplIds.has(String(emp.id))) return;
      const latest=asos.filter(a=>String(a.empId)===String(emp.id)&&a.periodicidade===per&&a.tipo==='Periódico')
        .sort((a,b)=>(b.vencimento||'').localeCompare(a.vencimento||''))[0];
      const dias=latest?.vencimento?daysDiff(latest.vencimento):null;
      const urg=getUrgencia(dias);
      if(urg==='vencido'||urg==='critico') urgent++;
    });
  });
  const nba=document.getElementById('nb-agend');
  if(nba){ nba.textContent=urgent; nba.style.display=urgent?'':'none'; }
}

// ── DATE ──
function setDate(){
  const d=new Date();
  document.getElementById('today-date').textContent=d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR',{weekday:'short',day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function destroyChart(id){ if(charts[id]){ charts[id].destroy(); delete charts[id]; } }

function renderDashboard(){
  const emps=getEmpregados(), asos=getASO(), trns=getTreinamentos(), devs=getDesvios(), brigs=getBrigada();

  // ── COUNTDOWN ──
  const ad=AUDIT_DATES['ihi'];
  const days=daysDiff(ad.start);
  const cdCls=days<=30?'danger':days<=90?'warn':'ok';
  const cdColor=cdCls==='ok'?'#006EFF':cdCls==='warn'?'#E07B00':'#D92D20';
  const cdBg=cdCls==='ok'?'rgba(0,110,255,.05)':cdCls==='warn'?'rgba(224,123,0,.05)':'rgba(217,45,32,.05)';
  const cdBorder=cdCls==='ok'?'rgba(0,110,255,.15)':cdCls==='warn'?'rgba(224,123,0,.2)':'rgba(217,45,32,.2)';
  document.getElementById('cd-banner').style.background=cdBg;
  document.getElementById('cd-banner').style.borderColor=cdBorder;
  document.getElementById('cd-banner').innerHTML=`
    <div style="text-align:center;min-width:90px">
      <div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:56px;letter-spacing:2px;line-height:1;color:${cdColor}">${days<0?'—':days}</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px">${days<0?'realizada':days===0?'HOJE':'dias'}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1">
      <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)">Auditoria Samarco — In Haus Industrial</div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:3px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">${ad.start} → ${ad.end} · 08:00–17:00</div>
    </div>
    <span class="badge ${cdCls==='ok'?'b-info':cdCls==='warn'?'b-warn':'b-danger'}" style="font-size:12px;padding:5px 14px">${cdCls==='ok'?'No prazo':cdCls==='warn'?'Atenção — menos de 90 dias':'Urgente'}</span>`;

  // ── KPIs ──
  let asoOk=0,asoVenc=0,asoWarn=0;
  asos.forEach(a=>{ const s=asoStatus(a.vencimento); if(s==='ok')asoOk++; else if(s==='vencido')asoVenc++; else if(s==='vencendo')asoWarn++; });
  let trnOk=0,trnVenc=0,trnWarn=0;
  trns.forEach(t=>{ const s=trnStatus(t.vencimento); if(s==='ok')trnOk++; else if(s==='vencido'||s==='pendente')trnVenc++; else if(s==='vencendo')trnWarn++; });
  const brigPct=emps.length?Math.round(brigs.length/emps.length*100):0;
  const reinc=devs.filter(d=>d.reincidencia).length;

  document.getElementById('kpi-row').innerHTML=`
    <div class="kpi neutral"><div class="kpi-bar info" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#006EFF,transparent)"></div>
      <div class="kpi-val info" style="font-size:38px">${emps.length}</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">Empregados ativos</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">${brigs.length} brigadistas (${brigPct}%)</div></div>
    <div class="kpi ${asoVenc>0?'danger':asoWarn>0?'warn':'ok'}">
      <div class="kpi-bar ${asoVenc>0?'danger':asoWarn>0?'warn':'green'}"></div>
      <div class="kpi-val ${asoVenc>0?'danger':asoWarn>0?'warn':'green'}" style="font-size:38px">${asoVenc}</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">ASO Vencidos</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">${asoWarn} vencendo · ${asoOk} em dia</div></div>
    <div class="kpi ${trnVenc>0?'danger':trnWarn>0?'warn':'ok'}">
      <div class="kpi-bar ${trnVenc>0?'danger':trnWarn>0?'warn':'green'}"></div>
      <div class="kpi-val ${trnVenc>0?'danger':trnWarn>0?'warn':'green'}" style="font-size:38px">${trnVenc}</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">Treinamentos vencidos</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">${trnWarn} vencendo · ${trnOk} em dia</div></div>
    <div class="kpi ${brigPct<10?'danger':'ok'}">
      <div class="kpi-bar ${brigPct<10?'danger':'green'}"></div>
      <div class="kpi-val ${brigPct<10?'danger':'green'}" style="font-size:38px">${brigPct}%</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">Brigadistas / efetivo</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">mínimo exigido: 10%</div></div>
    <div class="kpi ${reinc>0?'warn':'ok'}">
      <div class="kpi-bar ${reinc>0?'warn':'green'}"></div>
      <div class="kpi-val ${reinc>0?'warn':'green'}" style="font-size:38px">${devs.length}</div>
      <div class="kpi-label">Desvios registrados</div>
      <div class="kpi-sub">${reinc} reincidências</div></div>`;

  // ── CHART ASO ──
  destroyChart('chart-aso');
  const asoTotal=asos.length;
  const asoPend=Math.max(0,asoTotal-asoOk-asoWarn-asoVenc);
  const asoLegEl=document.getElementById('aso-legend');
  const asoTotalEl=document.getElementById('aso-chart-total');
  if(asoTotalEl) asoTotalEl.textContent=asoTotal+' exames cadastrados';
  const ctxA=document.getElementById('chart-aso');
  if(ctxA){
    if(!asoTotal){
      ctxA.closest('.card-body').innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="padding:24px"><div class="empty-icon" style="font-size:28px">🩺</div><div class="empty-text">Nenhum ASO cadastrado</div></div>';
    } else {
      charts['chart-aso']=new Chart(ctxA,{
        type:'doughnut',
        data:{
          labels:['Em dia','Vencendo (60d)','Vencidos','Pendentes'],
          datasets:[{
            data:[asoOk,asoWarn,asoVenc,asoPend],
            backgroundColor:['#16A34A','#E07B00','#D92D20','#9098B8'],
            borderColor:['#FFFFFF','#FFFFFF','#FFFFFF','#FFFFFF'],
            borderWidth:3,hoverOffset:10
          }]
        },
        options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'68%',
          plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:ctx=>`${ctx.label}: ${ctx.parsed} (${Math.round(ctx.parsed/asoTotal*100)}%)`}}}
        }
      });
      // Custom legend
      if(asoLegEl){
        const items=[
          {label:'Em dia',val:asoOk,pct:Math.round(asoOk/asoTotal*100),color:'#16A34A',bg:'#DCFCE7'},
          {label:'Vencendo',val:asoWarn,pct:Math.round(asoWarn/asoTotal*100),color:'#E07B00',bg:'#FEF3C7'},
          {label:'Vencidos',val:asoVenc,pct:Math.round(asoVenc/asoTotal*100),color:'#D92D20',bg:'#FEE2E2'},
          {label:'Pendentes',val:asoPend,pct:Math.round(asoPend/asoTotal*100),color:'#9098B8',bg:'#F1F3F9'},
        ];
        asoLegEl.innerHTML=items.map(it=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:${it.bg};margin-bottom:7px">
          <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:${it.color};flex-shrink:0"></div>
          <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;color:#12152A;font-weight:500">${it.label}</div>
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:${it.color};font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif">${it.val}</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:${it.color};font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">${it.pct}%</div>
        </div>`).join('');
      }
    }
  }

  // ── CHART DESVIOS ──
  destroyChart('chart-dev');
  const byTipo={};
  devs.forEach(d=>{ byTipo[d.tipo||'Outros']=(byTipo[d.tipo||'Outros']||0)+1; });
  const devTotal=devs.length;
  const devLegEl=document.getElementById('dev-legend');
  const devTotalEl=document.getElementById('dev-chart-total');
  if(devTotalEl) devTotalEl.textContent=devTotal+' desvios registrados';
  const ctxD=document.getElementById('chart-dev');
  if(ctxD){
    if(!devTotal){
      ctxD.closest('.card-body').innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="padding:24px"><div class="empty-icon" style="font-size:28px">✅</div><div class="empty-text">Nenhum desvio registrado</div></div>';
    } else {
      const devColors=['#D92D20','#E07B00','#006EFF','#7C3AED','#EA580C','#16A34A','#0891B2'];
      const devKeys=Object.keys(byTipo); const devVals=Object.values(byTipo);
      charts['chart-dev']=new Chart(ctxD,{
        type:'doughnut',
        data:{labels:devKeys,datasets:[{data:devVals,backgroundColor:devColors.slice(0,devKeys.length),borderColor:'#FFFFFF',borderWidth:3,hoverOffset:10}]},
        options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'68%',
          plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:ctx=>`${ctx.label}: ${ctx.parsed}`}}}
        }
      });
      if(devLegEl){
        devLegEl.innerHTML=devKeys.map((k,i)=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:8px;background:#F8F9FC;margin-bottom:6px;border-left:3px solid ${devColors[i]||'#9098B8'}">
          <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;color:#12152A;font-weight:500">${k}</div>
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:${devColors[i]||'#9098B8'};font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif">${devVals[i]}</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:${devColors[i]||'#9098B8'};font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">${Math.round(devVals[i]/devTotal*100)}%</div>
        </div>`).join('');
      }
    }
  }

  // ── ALERTAS ──
  let alerts=[];
  asos.forEach(a=>{ const s=asoStatus(a.vencimento); if(s==='vencido'||s==='vencendo') alerts.push({tipo:'ASO',nome:a.empregado,detalhe:a.tipo||'Periódico',venc:a.vencimento,s}); });
  trns.forEach(t=>{ const s=trnStatus(t.vencimento); if(s==='vencido'||s==='vencendo') alerts.push({tipo:'Treinamento',nome:t.empregado,detalhe:t.nome,venc:t.vencimento,s}); });
  alerts.sort((a,b)=>(daysDiff(a.venc)||9999)-(daysDiff(b.venc)||9999));
  const elA=document.getElementById('dash-alertas');
  const alertLabel=document.getElementById('alert-count-label');
  if(!alerts.length){
    if(alertLabel) alertLabel.textContent='';
    elA.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">✅</div><div class="empty-text">Nenhum alerta — todos os ASOs e treinamentos em dia.</div></div>';
    return;
  }
  if(alertLabel) alertLabel.textContent=`${alerts.length} alertas · ${alerts.filter(a=>a.s==='vencido').length} vencidos`;
  elA.innerHTML=alerts.slice(0,25).map(a=>{
    const d=daysDiff(a.venc);
    const isVenc=a.s==='vencido';
    return `<div class="alert-row">
      <span class="badge ${a.tipo==='ASO'?'b-info':'b-gray'}" style="font-size:10px;min-width:80px;justify-content:center">${a.tipo}</span>
      <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px;flex:1;margin:0 12px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${a.nome}</span>
      <span style="color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${a.detalhe}</span>
      <span class="badge ${isVenc?'b-danger':'b-warn'}" style="font-size:11px;min-width:90px;justify-content:center">${d<0?'Venc. '+Math.abs(d)+'d atrás':d+'d restantes'}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  if(alerts.length>25) elA.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',`<div style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center">+${alerts.length-25} alertas adicionais</div>`);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// EMPREGADOS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function autoFillTreinamentos(emp){
  const matrix=ROLES_MAP[emp.cargo]||[];
  const trns=getTreinamentos();
  const existing=new Set(trns.filter(t=>t.empId===emp.id).map(t=>t.nome));
  const adds=[];
  matrix.forEach(t=>{
    if(!existing.has(t.nome)){
      adds.push({id:Date.now()+Math.random(),empId:emp.id,empregado:emp.nome,cargo:emp.cargo,nome:t.nome,validade:t.val,tipo:'Obrigatório',realizado:'',vencimento:'',origem:'Passaporte Industrial',local:''});
    }
  });
  if(adds.length) saveTreinamentos([...trns,...adds]);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// EMPREGADOS — Card Grid System
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function renderEmpregados(){
  const emps=getEmpregados();
  const q=(document.getElementById('emp-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase();
  const cargo=document.getElementById('emp-filter-cargo')?.value||'';
  const status=document.getElementById('emp-filter-status')?.value||'';
  const turno=document.getElementById('emp-filter-turno')?.value||'';
  const trns=getTreinamentos(); const asos=getASO();

  // Fill cargo filter
  const cargos=[...new Set(emps.map(e=>e.cargo).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const cf=document.getElementById('emp-filter-cargo');
  if(cf){const cv=cf.value;cf.innerHTML='<option value="">Todos os cargos</option>'+cargos.map(c=>`<option value="${c}"${c===cv?' selected':''}>${c}</option>`).join('');}

  let list=emps.filter(e=>{
    if(q&&!e.nome.toLowerCase().includes(q)&&!(e.matricula||'').includes(q)&&!(e.cargo||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false;
    if(cargo&&e.cargo!==cargo) return false;
    if(turno&&e.turno!==turno) return false;
    if(status){const s=empStatus(e,trns,asos);if(s!==status)return false;}
    return true;
  });

  const el=document.getElementById('emp-grid');
  document.getElementById('emp-count-label').textContent=`${list.length} de ${emps.length} empregados`;
  document.getElementById('emp-filter-count').textContent=`${list.length} exibidos`;

  if(!list.length){
    el.innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="empty-icon">👤</div><div class="empty-text">Nenhum empregado encontrado.</div></div>';
    return;
  }
  // Render in chunks for performance
  const PAGE=30;
  const chunk=list.slice(0,PAGE);
  el.innerHTML=chunk.map(e=>buildEmpCard(e,trns,asos)).join('');
  if(list.length>PAGE){
    const moreBtn=document.createElement('div');
    moreBtn.style='grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:16px';
    moreBtn.innerHTML=`<button class="btn" onclick="loadMoreEmps(${PAGE},${JSON.stringify(list.map(e=>e.id)).replace(/"/g,'&quot;')})">Carregar mais (${list.length-PAGE} restantes)</button>`;
    el.appendChild(moreBtn);
  }
}
function loadMoreEmps(offset,ids){
  const emps=getEmpregados(); const trns=getTreinamentos(); const asos=getASO();
  const el=document.getElementById('emp-grid');
  const btn=el.lastChild; if(btn) el.removeChild(btn);
  const allList=ids.map(id=>emps.find(e=>e.id===id)).filter(Boolean);
  const chunk=allList.slice(offset,offset+30);
  chunk.forEach(e=>{ el.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',buildEmpCard(e,trns,asos)); });
  if(offset+30<allList.length){
    const moreBtn=document.createElement('div');
    moreBtn.style='grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:16px';
    moreBtn.innerHTML=`<button class="btn" onclick="loadMoreEmps(${offset+30},${JSON.stringify(ids).replace(/"/g,'&quot;')})">Carregar mais (${allList.length-offset-30} restantes)</button>`;
    el.appendChild(moreBtn);
  }
}

function empStatus(emp, trns, asos){
  const myT=trns.filter(t=>t.empId===emp.id);
  const myA=asos.filter(a=>a.empId===emp.id);
  let worst='ok';
  [...myT,...myA].forEach(x=>{
    const s=trnStatus(x.vencimento);
    if(s==='vencido'||s==='pendente') worst='danger';
    else if(s==='vencendo'&&worst==='ok') worst='warn';
  });
  return worst;
}

function buildEmpCard(e, trns, asos){
  const myTrns=trns.filter(t=>t.empId===e.id);
  const myAsos=asos.filter(a=>a.empId===e.id);
  const st=empStatus(e,trns,asos);
  const tDone=myTrns.filter(t=>t.realizado).length;
  const tVenc=myTrns.filter(t=>trnStatus(t.vencimento)==='vencido').length;
  const tWarn=myTrns.filter(t=>trnStatus(t.vencimento)==='vencendo').length;
  const pct=myTrns.length?Math.round(tDone/myTrns.length*100):0;
  const stColor=st==='ok'?'var(--accent)':st==='warn'?'var(--warn)':'var(--danger)';
  const stBadge=st==='ok'?'<span class="badge b-ok" style="font-size:10px">✓ Em dia</span>':
                st==='warn'?'<span class="badge b-warn" style="font-size:10px">⚠ Atenção</span>':
                '<span class="badge b-danger" style="font-size:10px">✕ Pendências</span>';
  const brigs=getBrigada(); const pads=getPadrinhos();
  const isBrig=brigs.find(b=>b.empId===e.id);
  const isPad=pads.find(p=>p.apadId===e.id&&p.status==='em_processo');
  const av=avatarColor(e.nome);

  // Training rows (searchable inside card)
  // Lazy: don't build trn rows now — build on demand when card opened
  const trnRows=''; // placeholder, loaded via loadEmpTrns()

  // ASO rows
  const asoRows=myAsos.length?`<div class="aso-hdr">
      <span>Tipo</span><span>Periodicidade</span><span>Realização</span><span>Vencimento</span><span>Médico</span><span>Status</span><span></span>
    </div>`+myAsos.map(a=>`<div class="aso-item">
      <select class="inp" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 5px" onchange="updateASO('${a.id}','tipo',this.value)">
        <option${a.tipo==='Admissional'?' selected':''}>Admissional</option>
        <option${a.tipo==='Periódico'?' selected':''}>Periódico</option>
        <option${a.tipo==='Demissional'?' selected':''}>Demissional</option>
        <option${a.tipo==='Retorno ao trabalho'?' selected':''}>Retorno ao trabalho</option>
        <option${a.tipo==='Mudança de função'?' selected':''}>Mudança de função</option>
      </select>
      <select class="inp" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 5px" onchange="updateASO('${a.id}','periodicidade',this.value)">
        <option${(a.periodicidade||'Anual')==='Anual'?' selected':''}>Anual</option>
        <option${a.periodicidade==='Semestral'?' selected':''}>Semestral</option>
      </select>
      <input type="date" class="inp" value="${a.data||''}" onchange="updateASO('${a.id}','data',this.value)" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 5px">
      <input type="date" class="inp" value="${a.vencimento||''}" onchange="updateASO('${a.id}','vencimento',this.value)" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 5px">
      <input class="inp" value="${escHtml(a.medico||'')}" onchange="updateASO('${a.id}','medico',this.value)" style="font-size:11px;padding:2px 5px" placeholder="Médico">
      ${statusBadge(asoStatus(a.vencimento))}
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteASO('${a.id}');renderEmpregados()" style="padding:2px 7px;font-size:11px">✕</button>
    </div>`).join('')
    :'<div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;padding:8px 0">Nenhum ASO. <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openModalASOFor(\''+e.id+'\')">+ Adicionar</button></div>';

  return `<div class="emp-card${true?' ':''}" id="empcard-${e.id}">
    <div class="emp-card-top" onclick="toggleEmpCard('${e.id}')">
      <div class="emp-avatar" style="background:${av}22;color:${av}">${initials(e.nome)}</div>
      <div class="emp-info">
        <div class="emp-name">${e.nome}</div>
        <div class="emp-role">${e.cargo}</div>
        <div class="emp-meta-row">
          ${stBadge}
          ${isBrig?'<span class="badge b-info" style="font-size:10px">🛡 Brigadista</span>':''}
          ${isPad?'<span class="badge b-ok" style="font-size:10px">🤝 Padrinho</span>':''}
          ${e.acidente?'<span class="badge b-danger" style="font-size:10px">⚠ Acidente</span>':''}
          <span class="badge b-gray" style="font-size:10px;font-family:var(--font-mono)">${tDone}/${myTrns.length}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;flex-shrink:0">
        <div style="display:flex;gap:5px">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openEditEmp('${e.id}')" title="Editar">✎</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteEmp('${e.id}')" title="Excluir">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:24px;color:${stColor}">${pct}%</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)">concluídos</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="emp-stat-bar">
      <div class="emp-stat-item"><span class="emp-stat-dot" style="background:var(--accent)"></span>${tDone} feitos</div>
      <div class="emp-stat-item"><span class="emp-stat-dot" style="background:var(--warn)"></span>${tWarn} vencendo</div>
      <div class="emp-stat-item"><span class="emp-stat-dot" style="background:var(--danger)"></span>${tVenc} vencidos</div>
      <div style="flex:1"></div>
      <div class="emp-stat-item">Mat. ${e.matricula||'—'} · ${tempoNa(e.admissao)}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:4px 18px 6px;background:var(--surface2)">
      <div class="prog-bar" style="height:4px">
        <div class="prog-fill ${st==='ok'?'green':st==='warn'?'warn':'danger'}" style="width:${pct}%"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="emp-detail" id="empdetail-${e.id}">
      <div class="emp-tabs" id="emptabs-${e.id}">
        <div class="emp-tab active" onclick="empTab('${e.id}','trn')">Treinamentos (${myTrns.length})</div>
        <div class="emp-tab" onclick="empTab('${e.id}','aso')">ASO (${myAsos.length})</div>
        <div class="emp-tab" onclick="empTab('${e.id}','info')">Dados Pessoais</div>
      </div>
      <div class="emp-tab-content active" id="tab-trn-${e.id}">
        <input class="inp trn-search" id="trnsearch-${e.id}" placeholder="🔍 Filtrar treinamento..." oninput="filterTrns('${e.id}',this.value)"
          style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:13px">
        <div class="trn-hdr" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 120px 120px 0 70px">
          <span>Treinamento</span><span style="text-align:center">Realização</span><span style="text-align:center">Vencimento</span><span></span><span>Status</span>
        </div>
        <div class="trn-list" id="trnlist-${e.id}" data-empid="${e.id}" data-loaded="false">
          <div style="color:var(--text3);padding:12px 0;font-size:13px">Clique para carregar ${myTrns.length} treinamentos...</div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openModal('treinamento')">+ Adicionar treinamento</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="emp-tab-content" id="tab-aso-${e.id}">
        <div class="aso-list" id="asolist-${e.id}">${asoRows}</div>
        <div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openModalASOFor('${e.id}')">+ Adicionar ASO</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="emp-tab-content" id="tab-info-${e.id}">
        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Matrícula</div><div class="info-val">${e.matricula||'—'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">CPF</div><div class="info-val">${e.cpf||'—'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">RG</div><div class="info-val">${e.rg||'—'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Admissão</div><div class="info-val">${fmtDate(e.admissao)}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Turno</div><div class="info-val">${e.turno||'—'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Local</div><div class="info-val">${e.local||'—'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Tempo na empresa</div><div class="info-val">${tempoNa(e.admissao)}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Acidente</div><div class="info-val">${e.acidente?'<span class="badge b-danger">Sim</span>':'<span class="badge b-ok">Não</span>'}</div></div>
          <div class="info-field"><div class="info-label">Nascimento</div><div class="info-val">${e.nascimento?fmtDate(e.nascimento):'—'}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:8px">🏖 Períodos de férias</div>
          <div id="ferias-emp-${e.id}" style="margin-bottom:8px">${buildFeriasEmp(e.id)}</div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openModalFeriasFor('${e.id}')" style="font-size:11px">+ Registrar férias</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function escHtml(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');}

function toggleEmpCard(id){
  const card=document.getElementById('empcard-'+id);
  const det=document.getElementById('empdetail-'+id);
  if(!card||!det) return;
  const isOpen=det.classList.contains('open');
  det.classList.toggle('open',!isOpen);
  card.classList.toggle('open',!isOpen);
  // Lazy load trainings on first open
  if(!isOpen){
    const trnEl=document.getElementById('trnlist-'+id);
    if(trnEl&&trnEl.getAttribute('data-loaded')==='false'){
      loadEmpTrns(id);
      trnEl.setAttribute('data-loaded','true');
    }
  }
}
function loadEmpTrns(empId){
  const el=document.getElementById('trnlist-'+empId);
  if(!el) return;
  const trns=getTreinamentos().filter(t=>t.empId===parseInt(empId)||String(t.empId)===String(empId));
  if(!trns.length){ el.innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--text3);padding:12px 0">Nenhum treinamento mapeado.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML=trns.map(t=>{
    const s=trnStatus(t.vencimento);
    const leftColor=s==='ok'?'#16A34A':s==='vencendo'?'#E07B00':s==='vencido'?'#D92D20':'#9098B8';
    return `<div class="trn-item ${s==='ok'?'ok':s==='vencendo'?'warn':s==='vencido'||s==='pendente'?'danger':'pending'}"
      data-trn-nome="${(t.nome||'').toLowerCase()}" style="border-left-color:${leftColor}">
      <div class="trn-name-wrap">
        <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);line-height:1.3">${escHtml(t.nome||'Sem nome')}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:3px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <span class="badge b-gray" style="font-size:10px">${t.tipo||'Obrigatório'}</span>
          ${t.validade?`<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--font-mono)">${t.validade}m</span>`:''}
          ${t.origem&&t.origem!=='Passaporte Industrial'?`<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)">${t.origem}</span>`:''}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Realização</div>
        <input type="date" class="inp" value="${t.realizado||''}" onchange="updateTrn('${t.id}','realizado',this.value)" style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 6px">
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Vencimento</div>
        <input type="date" class="inp" value="${t.vencimento||''}" onchange="updateTrn('${t.id}','vencimento',this.value)" style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 6px">
      </div>
      <div></div>
      ${statusBadge(s)}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function empTab(empId, tab){
  ['trn','aso','info'].forEach(t=>{
    document.getElementById('tab-'+t+'-'+empId)?.classList.toggle('active',t===tab);
  });
  const tabs=document.getElementById('emptabs-'+empId)?.querySelectorAll('.emp-tab');
  const tabNames=['trn','aso','info'];
  tabs?.forEach((el,i)=>el.classList.toggle('active',tabNames[i]===tab));
}

function filterTrns(empId, q){
  const list=document.getElementById('trnlist-'+empId);
  if(!list) return;
  const items=list.querySelectorAll('.trn-item');
  q=q.toLowerCase();
  items.forEach(item=>{
    const nome=item.getAttribute('data-trn-nome')||'';
    item.style.display=(!q||nome.includes(q))?'':'none';
  });
}

function updateTrn(id,field,val){
  const trns=getTreinamentos();
  const t=trns.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));
  if(!t) return;
  t[field]=val;
  if(field==='realizado'&&t.validade&&val) t.vencimento=addMonths(val,t.validade);
  if(field==='validade'&&t.realizado&&val) t.vencimento=addMonths(t.realizado,parseInt(val));
  saveTreinamentos(trns);
  updateNavBadge();
}

function updateASO(id,field,val){
  const asos=getASO();
  const a=asos.find(x=>String(x.id)===String(id));
  if(!a) return;
  a[field]=val;
  saveASO(asos);
  updateNavBadge();
}

function deleteEmp(id){
  if(!confirm('Remover empregado e todos os seus registros?')) return;
  saveEmpregados(getEmpregados().filter(e=>String(e.id)!==String(id)));
  saveTreinamentos(getTreinamentos().filter(t=>String(t.empId)!==String(id)));
  saveASO(getASO().filter(a=>String(a.empId)!==String(id)));
  renderView(currentView);
  updateNavBadge();
}


// ── STORAGE extras ──
function getNaoApl(){ return loadArr('naoapl'); }
function saveNaoApl(v){ saveArr('naoapl',v); }
function getAgendamentos(){ return loadArr('agend'); }
function saveAgendamentos(v){ saveArr('agend',v); }
function getFerias(){ return loadArr('ferias'); }
function saveFerias(v){ saveArr('ferias',v); }
function getEmpEscala(){ return loadArr('empesc'); }  // {empId, turma, h1, h2}
function saveEmpEscala(v){ saveArr('empesc',v); }

// ── AGENDAMENTO INTELIGENTE ──
// Para cada empregado, dado o vencimento e a periodicidade, encontra
// o primeiro dia de trabalho (turno 1 ou 2, não FF, não C, não férias)
// dentro da janela [venc-antMax .. venc-antMin]
function getEmpTurma(empId){
  const esc=getEmpEscala();
  const r=esc.find(e=>String(e.empId)===String(empId));
  if(!r) return null;
  if(r.tipo==='adm') return 'ADM';
  return r.turma||null;
}

function isEmFerias(empId, dateStr){
  const ferias=getFerias();
  return ferias.some(f=>{
    if(String(f.empId)!==String(empId)) return false;
    return dateStr>=f.inicio&&dateStr<=f.fim;
  });
}

function getTurnoNoDia(turma, dateStr){
  if(!turma||!ESCALA_2026[turma]) return null;
  return ESCALA_2026[turma][dateStr]||null;
}

function ehDiaTrabalho(turno){
  return turno==='1'||turno==='2';
}

function calcAgendamento(empId, vencimento, antMax, antMin){
  // antMax = max dias de antecedência (ex: 20), antMin = min (ex: 15)
  // Busca primeiro dia de trabalho na janela [venc-antMax .. venc-antMin]
  if(!vencimento) return null;
  const esc=getEmpEscala();
  const empConfig=esc.find(e=>String(e.empId)===String(empId));
  const isAdm=empConfig?.tipo==='adm';
  const turma=isAdm?null:getEmpTurma(empId);
  
  const venc=new Date(vencimento); venc.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const startD=new Date(venc); startD.setDate(startD.getDate()-antMax);
  const endD=new Date(venc); endD.setDate(endD.getDate()-antMin);
  
  const today=new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const searchStart=startD<today?today:startD;
  
  let cur=new Date(searchStart);
  while(cur<=endD){
    const ds=cur.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    if(isEmFerias(empId,ds)){ cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1); continue; }
    const feriado=FERIADOS_2026[ds];
    if(isAdm){
      // ADM: trabalha seg-sex, exceto feriados
      const dow=cur.getDay();
      if(dow>0&&dow<6&&!feriado) return {data:ds, turno:'ADM', fonte:'adm'};
    } else if(turma){
      const turno=getTurnoNoDia(turma,ds);
      if(ehDiaTrabalho(turno)&&!feriado){
        return {data:ds, turno, fonte:'escala'};
      }
    } else {
      // Sem turma definida: qualquer dia útil (seg-sex)
      const dow=cur.getDay();
      if(dow>0&&dow<6&&!feriado) return {data:ds, turno:'—', fonte:'sem_turma'};
    }
    cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1);
  }
  // Se não encontrou na janela ideal, busca o mais próximo antes do vencimento
  cur=new Date(endD); cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1);
  const limiar=new Date(venc); limiar.setDate(limiar.getDate()-1);
  while(cur<=limiar){
    const ds=cur.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    if(!isEmFerias(empId,ds)){
      const feriado2=FERIADOS_2026[ds];
      if(isAdm){
        const dow=cur.getDay();
        if(dow>0&&dow<6&&!feriado2) return {data:ds, turno:'ADM', fonte:'fora_janela'};
      } else if(turma){
        const turno=getTurnoNoDia(turma,ds);
        if(ehDiaTrabalho(turno)&&!feriado2) return {data:ds, turno, fonte:'fora_janela'};
      } else {
        const dow=cur.getDay();
        if(dow>0&&dow<6&&!feriado2) return {data:ds, turno:'—', fonte:'fora_janela'};
      }
    }
    cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1);
  }
  return null;
}

function getHorarioTurno(empId, turno){
  const esc=getEmpEscala();
  const r=esc.find(e=>String(e.empId)===String(empId));
  if(!r) return '—';
  if(turno==='1') return r.h1||'—';
  if(turno==='2') return r.h2||'—';
  return '—';
}

// ── ASO SUB-ABAS ──
let currentAsoTab='anual';
function asoSubTab(tab){
  currentAsoTab=tab;
  ['anual','semestral','naoapl','agendados','todos'].forEach(t=>{
    const pane=document.getElementById('aso-pane-'+t);
    const btn=document.getElementById('asoTab-'+t);
    if(pane) pane.style.display=t===tab?'':'none';
    if(btn){ btn.style.background=t===tab?'var(--accent)':''; btn.style.color=t===tab?'#0a0a0c':''; btn.style.borderColor=t===tab?'var(--accent)':'var(--border2)'; }
  });
  renderASOPane(tab);
}

function renderASOPane(tab){
  if(tab==='anual') renderASOAnual();
  else if(tab==='semestral') renderASOSemestral();
  else if(tab==='naoapl') renderNaoApl();
  else if(tab==='agendados') renderAgendados();
  else if(tab==='todos') renderASOTodos();
}

function buildASOPeriodRow(asos, emp, periodicidade, meses, antMax, antMin, tbodyId){
  // Find latest ASO for this emp and periodicidade
  const myAsos=asos.filter(a=>String(a.empId)===String(emp.id)&&(a.periodicidade===periodicidade||(periodicidade==='Anual'&&!a.periodicidade)));
  myAsos.sort((a,b)=>b.data?.localeCompare(a.data));
  const latest=myAsos[0];
  
  const vencimento=latest?.vencimento||'';
  const s=vencimento?asoStatus(vencimento):'pendente';
  const dv=vencimento?daysDiff(vencimento):null;
  const turma=getEmpTurma(emp.id)||'—';
  const agend=vencimento?calcAgendamento(emp.id,vencimento,antMax,antMin):null;
  const fora=agend?.fonte==='fora_janela';
  const horario=agend?getHorarioTurno(emp.id,agend.turno):'—';
  
  const agendCell=agend
    ? `<div><strong>${fmtDate(agend.data)}</strong>
       ${fora?'<span class="badge badge-warn" style="font-size:9px;margin-left:4px">Fora da janela ideal</span>':''}
       </div>
       <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);font-family:var(--font-mono)">Turno ${agend.turno} · ${horario}</div>`
    : (vencimento?'<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">—</span>':'<span style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">Sem vencimento</span>');

  const dvCell=dv!==null
    ? `<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:${dv<0?'var(--danger)':dv<=20?'var(--warn)':'var(--accent)'}">${dv<0?'Vencido '+Math.abs(dv)+'d':dv+'d'}</span>`
    : '—';

  return `<tr>
    <td style="font-weight:500">${emp.nome}</td>
    <td style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">${emp.cargo}</td>
    <td style="text-align:center"><span class="badge badge-neutral" style="font-size:10px">${turma}</span></td>
    <td>${fmtDate(latest?.data)}</td>
    <td>${fmtDate(vencimento)}</td>
    <td style="text-align:center">${dvCell}</td>
    <td>${latest?.exame||'—'}</td>
    <td>${agendCell}</td>
    <td>${statusBadge(s)}</td>
    <td>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="openModalASOFor('${emp.id}','${periodicidade}')" style="font-size:10px">+ ASO</button>
